title: Assembly Stats with MetaQuast
author: James E Thornton Jr
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j86crze

steps.title: Click "Sign Up" to create an account
steps.instruction: Click "Sign Up" to create an account.

steps.title: After account creation go back to https://user
steps.instruction: After account creation go back to https://user.cyverse.org/ and login with your account. https://user.cyverse.org/

steps.title: Click the "Data" button found on the left
steps.instruction: Click the "Data" button found on the left. Navigate to your user folder. a 5

steps.title: Upload your final
steps.instruction: Upload your final.contigs.fa file generated from Megahit. Important: You must scp your contigs to your local machine before you can upload. $ scp username@sftp.hpc.arizona.edu:/rsgrps/bh_class/username/assembly/megahit-out/final.contigs.fa .

steps.title: Once your upload is complete, click...
steps.instruction: Once your upload is complete, click on the "Apps" button found on the left. a

steps.title: Search for "MetaQuast"
steps.instruction: Search for "MetaQuast". Click on MetaQuast-4.3 (denovo based) a

steps.title: Under the "Fasta file(s)" tab, select the newly uploaded final
steps.instruction: Under the "Fasta file(s)" tab, select the newly uploaded final.contigs.fa file. This is the only parameter that needs to change. Click "Launch Analysis".

steps.title: Once MetaQuast is complete (email notification),...
steps.instruction: Once MetaQuast is complete (email notification), navigate to the output found in the "analyses" folder in your data storage.

steps.title: Download the "report
steps.instruction: Download the "report.html" file found in the MegaQuast output folder.

steps.title: Open the report
steps.instruction: Open the report.html file to see a summary of assembly statistics.
